description: railz.ai is the site for FIS Accounting Data as a Service, formerly Railz. It provides unified access to accounting, banking, and commerce data from connected small and midsize business systems.
summary: railz.ai exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the FIS Accounting Data as a Service API at `https://api.railz.ai/v2`, authenticated with a bearer access token minted from dashboard-issued client credentials.

surfaces.name: Accounting Data as a Service API
